heading: Joint United States-Canadian Commission; establishment; functions
label: 1102 Joint United States-Canadian Commission; establishment; functions

children.label: a
children.text: to accept title from the Hammer family to the former Roosevelt estate comprising the Roosevelt home and other grounds on Campobello Island;

children.label: b
children.text: to take the necessary measures to restore the Roosevelt home as closely as possible to its condition when it was occupied by President Franklin Delano Roosevelt;

children.label: c
children.text: to administer as a memorial the Roosevelt Campobello International Park comprising the Roosevelt estate and such other lands as may be acquired.
